# DIY Manual

Practical command cookbook for running X2Chess end-to-end from terminal cells (including Quarto).

Use this from repository root unless a section says otherwise.

## Quick Start (Most Used)

> Note: Browser mode is not used in this project. X2Chess runs as a Tauri desktop client.
> Note: X2Chess frontend uses port `5287`.
> Note: Developer-Tools defaults ON in `desktop:dev` and OFF in packaged PROD builds.
> Note: The Developer Dock starts closed in all modes and must be opened by the user.

### 1) Check and remove stale dev processes (recommended before start)

```{bash}
# Run from repository root (workspace root)
echo "Before cleanup:"
lsof -i tcp:8011 || true
lsof -i tcp:5287 || true

# Graceful stop first
lsof -ti tcp:8011 | xargs -r kill -15
lsof -ti tcp:5287 | xargs -r kill -15
sleep 1

# If still running, force stop
lsof -ti tcp:8011 | xargs -r kill -9
lsof -ti tcp:5287 | xargs -r kill -9

echo "After cleanup:"
lsof -i tcp:8011 || true
lsof -i tcp:5287 || true
```

### 2) Start Tauri desktop client (Terminal A)

```{bash}
cd frontend

# Optional: first-time setup
# npm install

npm run desktop:dev
```

> Note: `desktop:dev` starts its own frontend dev server.
> Tip: Use the menu toggle **Developer Tools** and then **Open Developer Dock** to access AST/DOM/Raw PGN tabs.
> Tip: Use menu controls **Save mode** (`Autosave`/`Manual`) and **Save now** for the active game tab.

## Useful Scripts

### Install/update dependencies

```{bash}
cd frontend
npm install
```

### Build frontend for production

```{bash}
cd frontend
npm run build
```

### Run frontend unit tests

```{bash}
cd frontend
npm test
```

### Run regression tests (targeted)

```{bash}
cd frontend
node --test test/app_shell/dev_dock_regression.test.js
```

### Stop local dev services quickly

```{bash}
lsof -ti tcp:5287 | xargs -r kill -9
```
